title: equisetum × trachyodon
intro: Equisetum × trachyodon, also known as scouring rush, is a hybrid plant species in the horsetail family (Equisetaceae) that is a cross between Equisetum telmateia and Equisetum limosum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum × trachyodon include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Equisetum × trachyodon can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
